evals.prompt: Rewrite this pasted GitHub-flavored markdown note into correct Obsidian Flavored Markdown with callouts and wikilinks.
evals.expected_output: Valid OFM: [[wikilinks]], > [!note] callouts, frontmatter preserved; no broken syntax.

evals.prompt: Add a contradiction callout and cross-references to an existing wiki page.
evals.expected_output: > [!contradiction] callout added with wikilinks to both sides; frontmatter updated timestamp.
